site.metaTitle: DataFootball — Daily Instagram & TikTok engagement ranking
site.metaDescription: The daily index of football's most-engaged posts. We rank clubs and national teams by engagement, likes and views across Instagram and TikTok — every day.

home.what: Every day we scan {count} of football's biggest accounts across Instagram and TikTok, then rank their best-performing posts. Pure engagement — no opinions, no fluff.

home.step1Body: Every post from {count} of the most-followed football accounts, every single day.
home.step2Body: Likes, comments, views and shares — equal weights, market-standard rates. No secret multipliers.
home.step3Body: The best posts become the daily ranking — here on the site and on @datafootball__.

tournament.label: National Teams Edition
tournament.body: Through July 20, the index follows 48 national teams instead of clubs. Clubs return July 21.

methodology.title: How we rank
methodology.intro: We index daily what the feed tells us. Here's the method.

about.title: About
about.lead: DataFootball is the daily index of football's most-engaged posts.
about.p1: Every day we scan the biggest football accounts on Instagram and TikTok and rank their best-performing posts — clubs in the regular season, national teams during major tournaments. No opinions, no hot takes. Just what the audience actually engaged with.
about.p2: We rank by engagement rate, likes, comments, views and shares — equal weights, the same way the industry measures it. The full breakdown is on the methodology page.
about.p3: Every metric comes from public data on the post itself. We never use private or estimated numbers — only what anyone can see.
about.p4: The index is published here and every day on @datafootball__, across Instagram and TikTok.
